description_long: This is a modern city bus with a predominantly white and green exterior, featuring large rectangular windows along both sides for passenger visibility. The bus has a flat roof with a central raised section, likely for ventilation or air conditioning, and a front digital display panel showing route information. The side profile reveals two wide passenger doors, one at the front and one in the middle, both flush with the body for easy boarding. The wheels are partially covered by the bus body, and the front windshield is wide, providing ample visibility for the driver. The bus is designed for urban public transportation, with clear signage and a streamlined, functional appearance.
description: A modern white and green city bus with large side windows, two passenger doors, and a digital route display on the front. The design is streamlined for urban public transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital route display, wide windshield, and the bus's green lower section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of large windows, two passenger doors, and the green and white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back window, taillights, and the continuation of the green and white color pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the window arrangement and absence of passenger doors on this side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large rectangular windows per side, evenly spaced, separated by vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width; windows are grouped in a continuous row with no significant variation.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: Text 'SAG-181.43' on the front and side, no distinct manufacturer logo visible.
